title: Single Food Life Cycle Infographic AI
sourceTitle: Single Food Life Cycle Infographic AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 3:4 science infographic showing the life cycle of garlic bulb through fresh, sprouting, drying, spoiled as one continuous food object. Subject: One complete garlic bulb stays structurally connected from end to end, with each time-slice segment showing a different stage rather than separate foods placed side by side. Scene: Light beige educational infographic surface with clean science-card polish; garlic bulb shows visible changes in color, firmness, moisture, sprouts, browning, wrinkling, and decay markers across the timeline are shown as observable color, texture, moisture, sprouting, wrinkling, or decay changes on the same food body. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 layout: top title area, centered horizontal food silhouette, four to six evenly divided time-slice sections from early condition to spoiled condition, clear separators, and compact notes around each segment. Signature Elements: Single-object continuity, horizontal time-slice divisions, stage labels for fresh, sprouting, drying, spoiled, realistic stage detail from garlic bulb shows visible changes in color, firmness, moisture, sprouts, browning, wrinkling, and decay markers across the timeline, and a top title naming the life of garlic bulb. Style: High-realism food-science infographic with Xiaohongshu-style clarity, realistic surface texture, clean cut-line rhythm, gentle shadows, and collectible educational-card finish. Color Palette: Warm light beige background, natural food colors that shift by stage, restrained annotation accents, crisp dark readable text, and small warning or check marks where useful. Lighting: Soft even studio light with subtle shadows that reveal food texture, moisture, wrinkles, sprouts, and spoiled details without making the graphic messy. Typography: Chinese infographic labels appear as short stage names, appearance notes, internal-change notes, and eating advice labels; all text stays brief, legible, and placed close to the relevant slice. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Single Food Life Cycle Infographic Single Food Life Cycle Infographic V1 English Regeneration 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 3:4 science infographic showing the life cycle of banana through green, ripe, spotted, overripe as one continuous food object. Subject: One complete banana stays structurally connected from end to end, with each time-slice segment showing a different stage rather than separate foods placed side by side. Scene: Light beige educational infographic surface with clean science-card polish; sugar, texture, aroma, cooking advice are shown as observable color, texture, moisture, sprouting, wrinkling, or decay changes on the same food body. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 layout: top title area, centered horizontal food silhouette, four to six evenly divided time-slice sections from early condition to spoiled condition, clear separators, and compact notes around each segment. Signature Elements: Single-object continuity, horizontal time-slice divisions, stage labels for green, ripe, spotted, overripe, realistic stage detail from sugar, texture, aroma, cooking advice, and a top title naming the life of banana. Style: High-realism food-science infographic with Xiaohongshu-style clarity, realistic surface texture, clean cut-line rhythm, gentle shadows, and collectible educational-card finish. Color Palette: Warm light beige background, natural food colors that shift by stage, restrained annotation accents, crisp dark readable text, and small warning or check marks where useful. Lighting: Soft even studio light with subtle shadows that reveal food texture, moisture, wrinkles, sprouts, and spoiled details without making the graphic messy. Typography: Chinese infographic labels appear as short stage names, appearance notes, internal-change notes, and eating advice labels; all text stays brief, legible, and placed close to the relevant slice. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
